nodes.name: File Trigger - Demo Transcript
nodes.description: Triggered when demo transcript is uploaded to transcripts/demo/

nodes.name: Execute Script - Extract Demo
nodes.description: Generates v1 account memo and agent spec

nodes.name: Check Matching Onboarding File
nodes.description: Checks if onboarding transcript exists with same filename

nodes.name: Execute Script - Update Onboarding
nodes.description: Applies structured patch and generates v2 + changelog

nodes.name: Store Outputs
nodes.description: Stores account memo, agent spec, and changes.json into outputs/accounts/

meta.note: This is a mock export representing how the Python CLI orchestrator would be structured inside n8n. The current implementation uses run_pipeline.py for deterministic zero-cost local execution.
